name: Chatham Indoor Golf Club
about: Chatham Indoor Golf Club (CIGC) is a local facility offering two golf simulator bays accessible 7 days a week, 365 days a year via smartphone remote access. The venue utilizes TrackMan 4 and TrackMan IO DUO technology, providing highly accurate launch data and access to iconic courses like Pebble Beach. CIGC operates as a club rather than a traditional membership, catering to golfers of all skill levels with flexible membership tiers and event hosting capabilities. The facility is located in Chatham, NJ, adjacent to a highly-rated restaurant, and emphasizes a comfortable, tour-level indoor golf experience for both improvement and recreational play.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan 4 and IO DUO technology for precise data analysis
Flexible membership options with no long-term commitments
Remote access booking via smartphone for convenience
Access to iconic virtual courses like Pebble Beach
Ability to host events and accommodate existing leagues

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned; located near Serenade restaurant
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Highly advanced launch monitor combining radar and high-end optics
Newest model allowing unencumbered swings for both right and left handed players

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Members are required to bring their own clubs for use in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or beverage service is mentioned; the venue is located near Serenade restaurant.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time to play 18 holes is not specified, but members can book sessions up to 3 hours at a time.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about kid-friendly amenities or policies is provided.
